subject: feat(api): migrate data layer from direct Supabase to tool-till-tees API
body:
All 8 data hooks now route mutations through the tool-till-tees REST API
instead of direct Supabase queries. Supabase client retained for auth and
realtime subscriptions only.

New src/api/ layer:
- client.ts: base fetch wrapper with auth headers and error normalization
- Per-resource modules: projects, agreements, modules, proposals, notes,
  notifications, signatures, pdfVerifications

Migrated hooks: useProjects, useAgreements, useModules, useProposals,
useNotes, useNotifications, useSignatureLog, usePdfVerifications.

Migrated AgreementDetailPage.tsx splitAgreement from supabase.rpc to hook.

Remaining Supabase RPC calls (need API endpoints in tool-till-tees):
- acceptHandshake (no standalone endpoint)
- moveModule (API expects full order, not direction)
- fetchVersions bulk query (no bulk versions endpoint)

Tags: api, migration, architecture, refactor
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: api-migration
Semver: minor
